best_paid_path: GLM Coding Plan through an MCP-capable coding client connected to KnowNet MCP.
realistic_free_path: GLM web chat with a copy-ready project snapshot packet; coding-tool setup unverified until operator has access.
path_policy: Free web uses copied packets; GLM Coding Plan/MCP-capable coding tools or API runner are the stronger paid paths.
do_not_add: Zread as substitute for live KnowNet state
